import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_line().ok_or("no input")?
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
  mut positives: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let p = parts.get(i).ok_or("bad index")?
    let n = string.parse_int(p).ok_or("bad int")?
    if n > 0
      positives = list.push(positives, n)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  match list.max(positives)
  when Some(m)
    println("max=#{m}")
  when None
    println("none")
  end
  Ok(())
end
